DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFFS DAVID WONPU, FREYA BERNARDO'S MOTION TO QUASH AND MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER CONCERNING DEPOSITION SUBPOENAS TO BUILDING DEPARTMENT AND PLANNING DEPARTMENT AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS CONTINUED FROM JUL-13-2018 TO JUL-16-2018, 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 302 PER EX PARTE ORDER FILED THIS DATE.

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFFS DAVID WONPU, FREYA BERNARDO'S MOTION TO QUASH AND MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER CONCERNING DEPOSITION SUBPOENAS TO BUILDING DEPARTMENT AND PLANNING DEPARTMENT AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS DENIED EXCEPT TO THE EXTENT THAT THE DEPOSITIONS OF THE NON-RETAINED EXPERTS SHALL NOT INCLUDE ANY TESTIMONY AS TO REMEDIATION MEASURES, IF ANY, UNDERTAKEN BY DEFENDANTS AFTER PLAINTIFFS VACATED THE PROPERTY. NO SANCTIONS. DEFENDANTS' ATTORNEY DID NOT SUBMIT THE REQUIRED ADMISSIBLE EVIDENCE AS TO THE TIME SPENT AND THE BILLING RATE IN OPPOSING THE MOTION. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC.3.1312. JUDGE PRO TEM: TOM COHEN; CLERK: WILLIAM TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion To Quash And Motion For Protective Order Concerning Deposition Subpoenas To Building Department And Planning Department And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-16-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFFS DAVID WONPU, FREYA BERNARDO'S Motion To Quash And Motion For Protective Order Concerning Deposition Subpoenas To Building Department And Planning Department And Request For Monetary Sanctions is Denied except to the extent that the depositions of the non-retained experts shall not include any testimony as to remediation measures, if any, undertaken by defendants after plaintiffs vacated the property. No sanctions. Defendants' attorney did not submit the required admissible evidence as to the time spent and the billing rate in opposing the motion. Prevailing party to prepare form of order that complies with CRC.3.1312. Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported.
